case_title: GILBERTO CHAVEZ VS. MISSION ORGANIC CENTER, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CHAVEZ, GILBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC CENTER, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, GILBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC CENTER, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAR-07-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC CENTER, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2016 - CONTINUED FOR DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-21-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
